# CoreLinkDev

> Affordable custom websites for small businesses nationwide — one flat $499, free demo first.

CoreLinkDev designs and builds professional small business websites for a one-time $499, with an optional $39/month care plan for hosting, security and updates. Owners see a free demo before paying.

## Pages

- [Home](/): $499 custom small business websites, free demo first.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Flat $499 build plus optional $39/month care plan.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Real small business website examples we've built.
- [About](/about): Small business web design company, nationwide, 20+ years combined experience.
- [FAQ](/faq): Straight answers on price, ownership, timelines and support.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a free demo or call 312-296-6033.
